nasb.text: How is the land in which they live, is it good or bad? And how are the cities in which they live, are they like open camps or with fortifications?

esv.text: and whether the land that they dwell in is good or bad, and whether the cities that they dwell in are camps or strongholds,

cnv.text: 看看他們住的地怎樣，是好是壞；看看他們所住的城鎮怎樣，是營地，還是城堡；

ccb.text: 那地方是好是坏，人们住的是坚固的城池还是不设防的营地；
